roles.name: Admin
roles.description: Administrative platform operations without owner override.

roles.name: Moderator
roles.description: Moderates workspace communication and user support.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Developer access to assigned projects and diagnostics.

roles.name: Team Member
roles.description: Team member for client communication and project support.

roles.name: Client
roles.description: Client partner with access to assigned workspaces.

permissions.description: Configure system chat channels and groups
Generate, edit, or delete client invoices
Access server operational telemetry and logs
Alter core site metadata and modules configuration

projects.name: WaidPulse AI Integrations
projects.description: An advanced orchestration middleware that connects enterprise databases with autonomous LLM agents to automate cross-departmental operations.
projects.problemSolved: Enterprise companies struggle to allow AI agents to safely access cross-departmental operations.

tasks.title: Integrate database filters
tasks.desc: Set up security gateway filters for model interactions.

tasks.title: Verify edge latency
tasks.desc: Test query latency bottlenecks on Cloud Run.

messages.body: Hello AeroGlobal Logistics! Welcome to your secure AfriWaid Workspace. We have loaded your requirements draft files.
Thank you, Waid! The node tracking system looks extremely clear. I scanned the requirements and everything tracks perfectly.
Splendid! We completed the design phase and have started the core middleware integration. Feel free to monitor milestones directly.
